description_long: This is a stylized adult male character with a tall, slender build, dressed in an elaborate, fitted uniform featuring gold trim and decorative buttons. The outfit includes a long, split-tailed coat, high-collared shirt, and matching pants, all tailored to give a formal, almost military appearance. The character's footwear consists of sturdy, heeled boots with layered detailing. His hair is long and intricately braided down the back, with voluminous, swept-back bangs framing a stern facial expression. The hands are outstretched horizontally, and the overall design suggests a figure of authority or importance, possibly from a fantasy or historical setting. The materials and finish give the figure a smooth, slightly matte appearance, with crisp edges and stylized proportions.
description: A tall, slender adult male in a formal, gold-trimmed uniform with a long braided hairstyle and heeled boots, exuding an air of authority and style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed uniform, facial features, and outstretched arms, highlighting the gold trim and button details.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizes the long braid, the split tail of the coat, and the profile of the boots and uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the braid, the back of the coat with its split tail, and the symmetrical design of the outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the braid, coat tail, and side profile of the uniform and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: formal military-style uniform with long split-tailed coat, high-collared shirt, and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a single thick braid down the back with voluminous swept-back bangs
